name: @idaakiwumi/frame-pulse-mcp
description: AI-native telemetry for creative workstations — monitor Blender, Unreal Engine, Houdini, and Maya via MCP
author: Ida Akiwumi

skills.name: Check System Health
skills.description: Monitor CPU, temperature, and thermal status before starting intensive renders

skills.name: Scan Creative Applications
skills.description: Detect running creative apps: Blender, Unreal Engine, Houdini, Maya, After Effects

skills.name: Throttle Background Process
skills.description: Reduce CPU priority of background processes to prevent overheating

skills.name: Emergency Throttle
skills.description: Immediately throttle highest CPU consumer during critical thermal events

skills.name: Restore Process Priority
skills.description: Return a throttled process to normal CPU priority

skills.name: Boost Process Priority
skills.description: Increase CPU priority for critical renders (use with caution)

manual.command: git clone https://github.com/idaakiwumi/frame-pulse-mcp.git && cd frame-pulse-mcp && pip install -e . && python -m frame_pulse.server
